11. Emerging Creatives track: Technical proﬁciency in common methods of content creation for immersive media such as creative coding, digital fabrication, physical computing, and 3-D modeling.

Through this unique cross-campus alliance of expert faculty members and resources at the University of Maryland, the Immersive Media Design major provides the scientiﬁc and scholarly foundations needed to advance the extraordinary potential of new and emerging forms of digital media. These new forms move beyond the usual flatscreen of laptops and desks to immerse the user in new and complex virtual environments, such as virtual reality, augmented reality, projective domes and spaces, interactive installations and sculptures, and tangible computing.
